utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Checking the final package: 
1. destination: included (Lisbon, Portugal) ✅
2. travel_dates: included (2024-06-20 to 2024-06-24) ✅
3. transportation: included with flight details and cost (type, class, cost, currency) ✅
4. accommodation: included with hotel name, type, stars, total_cost, currency ✅
5. activities: included with activities listed and total_cost, currency ✅
6. additional_services: included with extra service (fine dining experience cost, currency, and golf club access email sent) ✅
7. total_budget: included with amount and currency ✅
All items are fully specified with required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes Lisbon, Portugal as the destination, which has a rating of 8 in the ground-truth data. Transportation is a budget airline in economy class, which corresponds to a rating of 3. The accommodation chosen is Family Haven Hotel, rated 8. The activities include golf (Golf Day, rating 10), walking tour (City Walking Tour, rating 8), and a culinary experience (Fine Dining Experience, rating 10). An additional service is a fine dining experience, which again maps to Fine Dining Experience with a rating of 10.
